race.comment: The maiden stayers kick us off. HOPEFUL CAUSE (2) has hit the frame at the past couple of outings and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Will be rock-hard fit for this contest and should be right there when the whips are cracking. OLD FAITHFUL (4) was a touch disappointing when resuming but the last couple of efforts have been full of merit. Looms as the main danger. KOJAK (1) has placed around this circuit and looks ready for the step-up in trip now. Top-three credentials with Maloney on board. BE THY NAME (3) has gotten better with each career run, draws the inside alley and gets 2kg off with the claim. Ticks a few boxes for a race like this. SHIP HAPPENS (7) rounds out the selections in a race with only a handful of chances.
